    NoSQL and MongoDB

    less than 1 minute read

    On this page

    • Why NoSQL?

    Why NoSQL?

    It is not always the case that perfectly cleaned and prepared data is available for data scientitsts to work on. In many times, data manipulation is needed to feed the data into the later processes such as analysis and visualization.

    Tags: Data, MongoDB, NoSQL, SQL

    Updated: June 4, 2021
